heroDesc: Integrated manufacturing coordination for multi-process, multi-part projects
bodyTitle: Custom Manufacturing Service turns multi-part requirements into a manufacturable plan
bodyDesc: Custom manufacturing service is suitable for projects with multiple parts, multiple processes or assembly delivery. The focus is not a single machine capability, but requirement breakdown, process matching, supplier coordination, quality gates and delivery rhythm. The more complex the project, the more important it is to define use case, assembly relationships and quality documents before quoting.

panels.title: Project Breakdown
panels.subtitle: BOM / Drawings
panels.body: Split assemblies, purchased parts and made-to-order parts into executable tasks.

panels.title: Process Matching
panels.subtitle: Part-by-Part
panels.body: Review CNC, sheet metal, molding, 3D printing and finishing combinations.

panels.title: Delivery Management
panels.subtitle: Visible Gates
panels.body: Track risk through first article, process, assembly and shipment gates.

tableRows: Assembly drawing, part drawings, BOM, quantity, use case
CNC, sheet metal, molding, finishing, assembly
Different process lead times need unified scheduling
First article, sampling, assembly check, final inspection

Packaging and labels follow order agreement

steps.title: Organize requirements
steps.body: Provide assembly, BOM, part drawings, quantity, use case and delivery goals.

steps.title: Break down tasks
steps.body: Create machining, purchasing, finishing and assembly tasks by part and process.

steps.title: Execute and track
steps.body: Move through first article, production, external processing and assembly checks.

steps.title: Archive and deliver
steps.body: Prepare parts, inspection records, packaging labels and delivery list.

asideItems.label: Quality Focus
asideItems.value: Process handoff, lead time, assembly relationship

asideCta.title: Submit Requirements
asideCta.body: Upload drawings and project goals so engineers can review the service route.

related.title: Related Service Combinations
related.desc: Complex projects often combine multiple services. Review by geometry, volume, material and delivery goals.

items.title: CNC Machining Service
items.body: Milling, turning, mill-turn and hole-pattern machining for metal and engineering plastic parts.

items.title: Molding Service
items.body: Injection molding, tool trials, low-volume molding and design optimization for plastic parts.

items.title: Metal Stamping Service
items.body: Single-stage or progressive stamping for brackets, springs, housings and connectors.

faq.title: Custom Manufacturing Service FAQ
faq.desc: These answers help clarify fit, input files and quotation review before submitting a manufacturing request.

items.q: What projects is Custom Manufacturing Service suitable for?
items.a: Custom Manufacturing Service is suitable for projects that need manufacturing review based on drawings, material, quantity, tolerances and delivery goals, especially prototypes, low-volume parts and functional components.

items.q: What information is needed for a Custom Manufacturing Service quote?
items.a: Prepare 3D files, 2D drawings when tolerances matter, material grade, quantity, finish requirements, inspection needs and target delivery timing so engineers can evaluate the route accurately.

items.q: How are lead time and cost confirmed for Custom Manufacturing Service?
items.a: Lead time and cost are confirmed after reviewing geometry, material, process route, finishing, inspection scope and order quantity. Complex tolerances or special finishes may require engineering confirmation.

ctaDesc: Share drawings and requirements — our engineers will recommend a stable process route.
